ham.subject: Upcoming Office 365 Migration – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Team,

As part of our ongoing effort to improve productivity, Microsoft Office 365 will be upgraded on March 12th. Please save any unsaved files before the deadline and review the new collaboration guidelines attached.

If you have any questions, contact IT Support.

Thanks,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Office 365 Migration – Your Account Suspended
spam.body:
Attention Team,

All employees must comply with the upcoming Office 365 upgrade today. Failure to verify your account will result in immediate suspension of your work profile. Verify your credentials now: <URL>

If you do not act within 24 hours, your application access will be disabled.

Best regards,
Microsoft Compliance Team
